Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7A15 "NODESOFYESOD-SLOW-7A15" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Nodes of Yesod (Slow Version).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JSR $89AF instruction at $8700 to be JSR $7C00 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $7C00 to set $15 to $01 so that the game defaults to joystick. The routine then jumps to $89AF to carry on the normal code flow. 3. Patched the JSR $87A5 instruction at $8712 to be JSR $7D00 instead. 4. Added a small routine at $7D00 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $3A to $04 and returns, causing the game to start. If not pressed, the routine then jumps to $87A5 to carry on the normal code flow.
